scheduled_workouts.name: Plank and crunch variations (HIIT)
scheduled_workouts.description: Focus on form on individual moves. If something is too easy, perform slower. Focus is on form and speed. Complete as many in the time as possible.

scheduled_workouts.name: Endurance and tempo form-2
scheduled_workouts.description: This session is a fun one! With plenty of form tips to focus on you will be surprised how quickly this one flies by! Each interval has a form focus to help improve running efficiency.

scheduled_workouts.name: 90sec threshold intervals-2
scheduled_workouts.description: These short and focused threshold efforts will increase your bodies lactate tolerance - your ability to convert blood lactate to energy. The added bonus of this session is you have equal recovery to work intervals - nice for balancing the workload and recovery!

scheduled_workouts.name: Plank and crunch variations (SSS)-3
scheduled_workouts.description: Focus on form on individual moves. If something is too easy, perform slower. Focus is on form and speed. Complete as many in the time as possible.

W2 Sat Long Run - 12mi Race Practice Long Run (12mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 2/13)

3mi at a conversational pace
3mi at 9:45/mi
5mi at 8:55/mi (your target Marathon pace)
1mi at a conversational pace with Runna.

scheduled_workouts.name: W2 Thu Easy Run #2 - 5.5mi Easy Run (5.5mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 2/13)

5.5mi easy run at a conversational pace (no faster than 9:55/mi). This is a limit, not a target - run at whatever pace feels truly easy! with Runna.

scheduled_workouts.name: W2 Wed Tempo - Progression Run (6.5mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 2/13)

1.25mi warm up at a conversational pace (no faster than 9:55/mi)

1mi at 9:25/mi
1mi at 9:05/mi
1mi at 8:40/mi
1mi at 8:25/mi, 90s walking rest

1.25mi cool down at a conversational pace (or slower!) with Runna.

scheduled_workouts.name: W2 Mon Easy Run - 6mi Easy Run (6mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 2/13)

6mi easy run at a conversational pace (no faster than 9:55/mi). This is a limit, not a target - run at whatever pace feels truly easy! with Runna.

scheduled_workouts.name: W1 Sat Long Run - 11mi Long Run (11mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 1/13)

11mi at a conversational pace with Runna.

scheduled_workouts.name: W1 Tue Intervals - 1km Repeats (4.6mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 1/13)

1.3mi warm up at a conversational pace (no faster than 10:00/mi), 90s walking rest

4 reps of:
• 0.62mi at 8:15/mi (8:00-8:30/mi), 90s walking rest

0.8mi cool down at a conversational pace (or slower!) with Runna.

scheduled_workouts.name: W1 Thu Tempo - Rolling 400s (4.5mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 1/13)

1.25mi warm up at a conversational pace (no faster than 10:00/mi)

Repeat the following 4x:
----------
0.25mi at 8:20/mi
0.25mi at 9:25/mi
----------

90s walking rest

1.25mi cool down at a conversational pace (or slower!) with Runna.

scheduled_workouts.name: W1 Mon Easy Run - 7.5mi Easy Run (7.5mi)
scheduled_workouts.description:
Marathon Plan (Week 1/13)

7.5mi easy run at a conversational pace (no faster than 10:00/mi). This is a limit, not a target - run at whatever pace feels truly easy! with Runna.
